title: Decision Pulse Toggle
prompt: Create a production-ready Decision Pulse Toggle using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original miscellaneous control lets a team mark a decision as Ready or Needs review, pairing a clear binary switch with an explanatory status row. Use a white 22px-radius Bento card on a pale gray surface, #111111 headline, #4A4A4F supporting text, #ECECEE border, and only cyan for Ready plus lemon for Needs review. The card must not use a gradient, excessive shadow, or decorative clutter. Start with Needs review as a meaningful server-rendered state. Use one semantic button with aria-pressed and a robust visible focus ring; click, Enter, and Space should toggle it. The thumb can move with a spring near stiffness 380 damping 26, and the status copy can fade over 150ms ease-out. Keep state local, announce the new text through an aria-live polite region, retain 44px target sizing, and ensure words and an icon distinguish the state in addition to color. The layout must be useful in a compact card at 320px and expand without page-level positioning in detail preview. Do not use random values, remote images, browser storage, network requests, or timers. Preserve AA contrast and logical tab order. In prefers-reduced-motion, snap the thumb to its final location and use only a brief opacity change. Return complete paste-ready client code, followed by a pure CSS approximation and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <section class="decision-pulse-toggle"><button aria-pressed="false">Needs review</button></section> */
.decision-pulse-toggle{max-width:22rem;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.decision-pulse-toggle button{min-height:44px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:999px;background:#f5e642;color:#111;font-weight:800}.decision-pulse-toggle button[aria-pressed=true]{background:#53e8d4}.decision-pulse-toggle button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.decision-pulse-toggle *{transition:none!important}}

demoCode:
